scope: real minimal-label curves (R2 labeled slice, coverage-decomposed); not SOTA

0.claim_boundary: k=0: no estimator licensed under R1 (non-identifiable).

1.claim_boundary: k>0 estimates a labeled-slice gain under an iid sampling contract and compares it to the oracle full-target sign; NOT full-target identification without that contract.

2.claim_boundary: k>0 estimates a labeled-slice gain under an iid sampling contract and compares it to the oracle full-target sign; NOT full-target identification without that contract.

baselines.note: always_predict_harm is an ORACLE class-balance baseline for evaluating retrospective sign predictors; it is NOT licensed under R1.

claim_boundary: k=0 = R1 non-identifiable (no estimator, accuracy NULL); k>0 = R2 labeled slice under an iid sampling contract vs the oracle full-target sign; not full-target identification. Oracle labels used only here (R2/evaluation).
